sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19170" key="*bakxeiako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Βακχ-ειακός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Βακχεῖος</ref> </xr> 11.3, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέτρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:13:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
